ideas.idea: Portal AI chat box for parents
ideas.context: Onboarding v2 — parents ask any question, get instant AI answer from B&G knowledge base + human team can see and respond. Every unanswered question becomes a new KB entry.

ideas.idea: Meet the Team videos on portal
ideas.context: Harry, Brodie, Norri, Rye — photo, short bio, personal video + optional 'book a call' button. Makes B&G feel like a team, not a faceless service.

ideas.idea: Mentor intro call replaces Brodie's activation text
ideas.context: Harry+Rye session — mentor is the first relationship the parent experiences post-close. More impactful than an operational text from Brodie.

ideas.idea: Structured DC handoff notes drive onboarding speed
ideas.context: Multiple objections + sceptical = FAST TRACK activation. No objections + all in = standard pace. Price objection + cold = highest churn risk.

ideas.idea: Greys & Greens — preserve family memories (recordings + keepsakes)
ideas.context: Moved from Exploring to Active in team meeting. Sibling brand to B&G.

ideas.idea: Weekly mentor community call — voluntary, flexible attendance
ideas.context: Team meeting decision. Build mentor belonging without making it feel mandatory.

ideas.idea: NDIS provider registration — families use plans to pay for sessions
ideas.context: Discussed re: gov funding. More realistic revenue path than grants. Already have NDIS families.

ideas.idea: Research partnership with uni to study B&G mentoring outcomes
ideas.context: Discussed re: gov funding. Uni applies for grant, B&G provides program + data. Credibility + funding pipeline.

ideas.idea: Ad queue dashboard — Harry drops Drive link + ad set + copy, Leo executes
ideas.context: Streamline ad upload process. Harry shouldn't have to explain each ad — just submit batch.

ideas.idea: Hire a 'community mum' as 4th microowner when hitting 20+ closes/week
ideas.context: Capacity ceiling for microowner model. Systematise first, delegate later.
